# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1  # Define the API version you are using, usually `v1` or 'apps' depends on your deployment kind (e.g., Deployment).
kind: ConfigMap   # Specify what object is created; here it will be a Kubernetes Configmap for adding Linkerd annotations to pods with Service Annotation enabled and applying them through sidecar proxy configuration by default using the linkerd/linkerd-proxy-inject annotation.
metadata:  // Meta data of this object (name, namespace). This can be different from your application or environment specific details if you use custom resource definitions in Kubernetes instead standard objects like Pods and Services etc..
annotations:   // Annotation keys to set for the ConfigMap on creation. Here we will define a Linkerd annotation that instruct linkerd inject proxy into pod, which is automatically done via Service's `linkerd/inject` annotation by default if not provided manually otherwise it should be added when services are created with respective values using configmap
data:  // This contains key-value pairs of the data to add. Here we define a single line that will contain our configuration for Linkerd annotations - `linkerd.io/inject=enabled` which is used by default and instructs linkerd inject proxy into pod or sidecar container where it should be done automatically if not provided manually otherwise you need to provide this on create service command
